chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1745 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5850/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.5851/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Shar, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and does not wish to press the present Constitution Petition, if the DIG Sukkur is directed to decide the application moved by petitioner and others, which is available at page No.19 and is presently pending before him. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, learned Additional Advocate General, who is present in Court in other matters, has waived notice of this application and has raised no objection. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition is disposed of. However, the DIG Sukkur is directed to personally look into the matter and decide the said application, submitted by the petitioner and others, strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
